title: Choose the Right Trigonometric Ratio
text: Consider which trigonometric ratio relates the opposite side (height) and the adjacent side (ground distance) to the angle of elevation.

title: Set up the Equation
text: Formulate the equation using the chosen trigonometric ratio and the given values.

title: Calculate the Angle
text: Solve for the angle of elevation, rounding to one decimal place.

title: Compute Angle
text: Calculate the angle of elevation in degrees, rounded to one decimal place.
